candidate_definitions.text: Design data, including design tokens, component schemas, and tooling for Spectrum, Adobe's design system.

Note: for [Spectrum 2](https://s2.spectrum.adobe.com/) token data has been graduated to the `main` branch. If you need access to the S1 data, use the [`s1-legacy` branch](https://github.com/adobe/spectrum-design-data/tree/s1-legacy) and `v12.x.x` packages on [NPM](https://www.np…
